title: GapDetection Input
description: Validated inputs for gap-detection skill execution

targetDir.description: Absolute or relative path to the directory to scan. Defaults to current working directory.

checks.description: List of check categories to run. Defaults to all.

outputPath.description: Optional path to write the report. Defaults to .claude/context/tmp/gap-detection-report-YYYY-MM-DD.md

maxResults.description: Maximum number of gaps to list per category in the report.
